title: Day 6 Lesson 2 ( Video )Going somewhere with someone
html:
Day 6 - Lesson 2

だれかと　いきます (darekato ikimaska?) = Going with someone

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ  (kyooshitsu)　= Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): りゅうがくせい　ふたり (ryuugaksee hutari) = Two study abroad students

For the new words, please refer to the vocabulary section and the subtitles.
